title: nephrodium marginale
intro: Nephrodium marginale, also known as the Marginal Fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Matoniaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Nephrodium marginale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, which in turn offer health benefits such as improved respiratory function and enhanced immune system. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium marginale can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like bronchitis, coughs, and skin infections.
